---
title: "Talks"
description: "Slides from meetups and conferences about the hyperverse ecosystem."
listing:
  contents: talks/*/index.qmd
  type: custom
  template: _talks-listing-item.ejs.md
  fields: [date, title, event, description, langs]
  sort: "date desc"
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  feed: true
  date-format: "MMMM D, YYYY"
page-layout: full
toc: false
---
